column1: In case of problem, please report to:

<DESCRIPTION>Vertical structure of edge-on galaxies (Bizyaev+, 2002)</DESCRIPTION>  <INFO name="ivoid" value="ivo://cds.vizier/j/a+a/389/795">    IVOID of underlying data collection  </INFO>
<INFO name="data_ivoid" value="ivo://cds.vizier/j/a+a/389/795">    IVOID of underlying data collection  </INFO>
<INFO name="creator" value="Bizyaev D.">    First author or institution  </INFO>
<INFO name="cites" value="bibcode:2002A&A...389..795B">    Article or Data origin sources  </INFO>
<INFO name="original_date" value="2002">    Year of the article publication  </INFO>
<INFO name="citation" value="doi:10.26093/cds/vizier.33890795">    Dataset identifier that can be used for citation  </INFO>
<INFO name="publication_date" value="2018-01-10">    Date of first publication in the data centre  </INFO>
<!-- +++No column could be found to attach a LINK in table: J/A+A/389/795/table1 -->
<FIELD name="_Glon" ucd="pos.galactic.lon" ref="G" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LON" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Galactic longitude (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Glat" ucd="pos.galactic.lat" ref="G" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LAT" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Galactic latitude (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_RAJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.ra" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Right ascension (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DEJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.dec" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Declination (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_RAB1950" ucd="pos.eq.ra" ref="B1950" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Right ascension (FK4, Equinox=B1950.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DEB1950" ucd="pos.eq.dec" ref="B1950" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Declination (FK4, Equinox=B1950.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Elon2000" ucd="pos.ecliptic.lon" ref="E2000" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EC_LON" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Ecliptic longitud Equinox=J2000.0 (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Elat2000" ucd="pos.ecliptic.lat" ref="E2000" datatype="double" width="10" precision="6" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EC_LAT" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Ecliptic latitud Equinox=J2000.0 (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<DESCRIPTION>Name of the galaxy according to RFGC catalog (Cat. <VII/219>)</DESCRIPTION>
<!-- No link in: \Wlay{CRFGC}{Original data from catalog {\bf RFGC}}{VizieR-S?RFGC ${*}}{${}} -->
<FIELD name="Dist" ucd="pos.distance" datatype="float" width="6" precision="2" unit="Mpc"><!-- ucd="PHYS_DISTANCE_TRUE" -->
<FIELD name="Re" ucd="src.morph.scLength" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="kpc"><!-- ucd="PHYS_SIZE_LENGTH" -->
<FIELD name="S0" ucd="phot.mag.sb;em.IR.K" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag.arcsec**-2"><!-- ucd="PHOT_SB_K" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Central surface brightness reduced to the face-on inclination in Ks band</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="Z0" ucd="src.morph.scLength" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="kpc"><!-- ucd="PHYS_SIZE_LENGTH" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[x] x: galaxy that belongs to the subsample (major axis > 1')</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_RA" ucd="pos.eq.ra;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA_MAIN" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Right Ascension (J2000) from SIMBAD (not part of the original data)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DE" ucd="pos.eq.dec;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC_MAIN" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Declination (J2000) from SIMBAD (not part of the original data)</DESCRIPTION>
